cases.title: WHERE single-table: prefix matches BOTH columns and table name

expected.comment: Rule BOTH-match (single table): unqualified column-name matches, then qualified versions, then table expansion remaining columns, then functions.

cases.title: WHERE single-table: prefix matches ONLY table name

expected.comment: Table-name expansion only: all products.* columns qualified in schema order. No function starts with 'prod'.

cases.title: JOIN_ON generic prefix without aliases
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM users JOIN orders ON u|

expected.comment: No alias-exact-match available. In scope-restricted JOIN_ON: users table expansion + orders.user_id column-name match + u* functions.

cases.title: GROUP_BY single-table BOTH-match with different schema
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM carts GROUP BY c|

expected.comment: BOTH-match ordering in GROUP BY with single table carts.

cases.title: HAVING: aggregate-first ordering with prefix
cases.sql: SELECT method, COUNT(*) FROM payments GROUP BY method HAVING m|

expected.comment: HAVING with prefix: aggregate functions first, then columns, then non-aggregate functions.

cases.title: WHERE with alias mismatch: no invalid table-name qualification
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM user_sessions us WHERE user_s|

expected.comment: Alias is 'us'. Prefix does not exactly match alias and no scoped column/function starts with 'user_s'. Must return empty.
